## Summary

Brief description of the change and the motivation.

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality not to work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Internal / chore (build, CI, refactor, deps)

## Changes

- Bullet list of the concrete things this PR does.

## Verification

How you verified this works locally:

```bash
# commands you ran
pnpm test
pnpm build
```

Include screenshots, logs, or a recording for UI/UX changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I added tests that cover the new behavior or bug fix.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` and they pass.
- [ ] I updated docs (`apps/docs` and/or relevant READMEs) if behavior or API changed.
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits.
